text: When running build commands in this project, use ./tools/run <subcommand> instead of ./runner or other build tools; the project uses a custom runner located at ./tools/run.
source_error:
Error: This project does NOT use npm, make, or Python entry points for ops commands. It uses a custom runner at ./tools/run.
Try again with: ./tools/run <subcommand>
Available subcommands: build, migr
